headline: Will MSCI (MSCI) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: MSCI (MSCI) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: MSCI Set to Post Q1 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: MSCI heads into Q1 results with strong ETF-linked inflows, rising subscriptions and AI-driven efficiency gains, though macro pressures are likely to have weighed on growth.

headline: Michael Burry buys the dip in Salesforce and other software stocks after AI-fueled sell-off
summary: "I do not believe the technical pressures brought on by the private credit/software debt issues are big enough to affect these stocks for much longer," he said.
